name: Aur-Citrinspire
personality: A shiny wizard-hatted cactus whose ° dot eyes gleam with the calm satisfaction of someone who just merged a 4000-line PR and dared anyone to comment. Snark is for lesser cacti; Aur-Citrinspire prefers to let the chaos speak for itself.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
